insightExplanation.glycemic: Glycemic impact estimates how quickly this product may raise blood sugar levels, based on its carbohydrate and fibre content.
insightExplanation.sodium: Sodium levels indicate the salt content per serving. High sodium intake is linked to elevated blood pressure and cardiovascular strain.
insightExplanation.saturatedFat: Saturated fat content is associated with increased LDL cholesterol when consumed in excess.
insightExplanation.sugar: Sugar load reflects the total sugar content, which affects blood sugar, energy levels, and dental health.
insightExplanation.fiber: Fibre content matters for digestive conditions like IBS and Crohn's. High fibre can be beneficial or problematic depending on the condition.
insightExplanation.protein: Protein content is important for muscle repair, satiety, and metabolic conditions like PCOS or post-bariatric recovery.
insightExplanation.calorie: Calorie density measures the energy content per gram of food. Higher density foods provide more energy in smaller portions.
insightExplanation.inflammatoryFat: Inflammatory fat is a proxy based on saturated fat and trans-fat content, relevant for autoimmune and inflammatory conditions.
insightExplanation.digestiveLoad: Digestive load combines fat and fibre content to estimate how much work your digestive system needs to process this food.
insightExplanation.carbLoad: Carb load reflects the total carbohydrate content minus fibre, relevant for keto, diabetic, and metabolic conditions.
insightExplanation.additives: Additive count tracks the number of food additives (E-numbers and similar) present in this product.

section.nutrientWatchlistSubtitle: Nutrients you're monitoring based on your health profile.

allergen.tracesWarningText: May contain traces of: {{traces}}. This could affect {{name}} due to cross-contamination.
